backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Beast Clipping backend, defining data types (UserProfile, VideoClip, FeedbackSubmission, etc.) and integrating authorization, blob storage, and HTTP outcall mixins for a YouTube clip management platform.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to their titles, associated frontend/backend files, component dependencies, and test IDs for tracking implementation confidence of major app features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key behaviors of components, hooks, and pages in the Beast Clipping app.
frontend/.env: Frontend environment file containing the Vite-exposed Google OAuth client ID used for YouTube authentication.
frontend/.env.example: Template environment file with a detailed step-by-step guide for obtaining and configuring a Google OAuth client ID, including troubleshooting tips.
frontend/.gitignore: Standard gitignore for a Vite/Node frontend project, excluding node_modules, build output, editor files, and environment variable files.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including sidebar, chart, and UI element colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite app, setting the page title to 'Beast Clipping' and mounting the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that configures TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider, and handles system pause state, profile setup modal, and account status guarding.
frontend/src/components/AccountStatusErr: Full-screen error component displayed when a user's account is banned or suspended, showing an appropriate icon, message, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/AccountStatusGua: A passthrough guard component that wraps children without any access restriction, as backend user status management is not implemented.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogTable: Displays a searchable, auto-refreshing table of activity logs fetched from the backend actor, showing user short IDs, actions, and relative timestamps.
Renders a debug card for admins showing authentication info, admin principals, hashmap size, and initialization status, with copy and refresh functionality.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: A React class-based error boundary that catches errors in the admin panel and displays a styled error card with stack trace details and retry/home options.
frontend/src/components/AdminList.tsx: Fetches and displays the list of current admin principals with their short user IDs using the useAdminList hook.
Provides a form to add a new admin by principal ID using the useAddAdmin mutation, and renders the AdminList component below it.
frontend/src/components/AdminMessaging.t: Renders a form for admins to send a message to a specific user by principal ID, using the useSendAdminMessage mutation.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: The main admin panel component that renders collapsible sections for system controls, analytics, user management, messaging, feedback, activity logs, admin management, and a debug panel, gated by owner status.
frontend/src/components/AppAnalytics.tsx: Displays admin analytics dashboard with total clips count, trending clips count, and a bar chart of top clip scores using Recharts.
frontend/src/components/AppShell.tsx: Root layout component that renders a desktop sidebar, scrollable main content area, mobile bottom navigation, and a notification toast container.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Mobile bottom navigation bar with route links filtered by auth state, plus Feedback and Admin panel buttons for authenticated/owner users.
frontend/src/components/BurnInCaptionsTo: Small toggle button component that activates or deactivates burn-in captions, with active/inactive visual styles.
frontend/src/components/CaptionEditor.ts: AI caption editor with a textarea (500-char limit), emoji quick-insert buttons, copy-to-clipboard, and a formatting tips tooltip.
frontend/src/components/ChannelConnectio: Displays the YouTube channel connection status (loading, connected, or disconnected) using the useYouTubeChannel hook.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Card component for a single clip showing thumbnail, viral score badge, duration, and action buttons for download, export format selection, sharing, Discord, and minting.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of ClipCard components from the useClips hook, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
Shows AI-generated clip suggestions and trending clips as selectable buttons, each displaying title, time range, and viral score badge.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: A form component for creating video clips by entering a title and start/end timestamps (minutes/seconds), with support for pre-filling from suggestions and saving via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/DetectHypeButton: A button component that simulates hype detection by generating random peak timestamps distributed across a video's duration after a short delay.
frontend/src/components/ExportFormatDrop: A dropdown component for selecting a video export format (MP4, GIF, or MP3) with icons and a click-outside-to-close overlay.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackModal.ts: A dialog modal for submitting bug reports or feature requests with a type selector, title, and description fields, using a mutation hook to send feedback.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackSubmissi: Displays a list of feedback submissions fetched from a hook, showing type, title, submitter ID, and timestamp, with per-item delete confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/GreenScreenOverl: Renders a grid of toggle buttons for applying colored visual overlays (green, red, blue, gold), tracking the active overlay via props.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: A passthrough layout wrapper component that simply renders its children, kept for compatibility while actual layout is handled by AppShell.
frontend/src/components/MemeOverlayPanel: A collapsible panel combining sound effect buttons and visual overlay buttons under a 'MEME OVERLAYS' header with expand/collapse toggle.
frontend/src/components/MintToGalleryBut: A button that triggers minting a clip to a gallery, showing a loading spinner during minting and a 'MINTED' badge if the clip has already been minted.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: Renders a bell icon button with an unread count badge that toggles a dropdown panel listing notifications with mark-read and mark-all-read functionality.
frontend/src/components/NotificationToas: Displays transient toast popups in the top-right corner for new unread notifications, auto-dismissing after 5 seconds and tracking already-shown IDs to avoid duplicates.
Provides quick preset buttons to set clip start/end times to the last 30s, last 60s, or an auto-detected highlight segment around 40% of the video duration.
frontend/src/components/PausedScreen.tsx: Full-screen maintenance/paused state page with a pause icon, descriptive message, and a button to re-check system status via React Query cache invalidation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog for first-time users to enter a display name and save their profile via a mutation hook, blocking dismissal until the form is submitted.
frontend/src/components/SendToDiscordBut: Button that opens a modal prompting the user for a Discord webhook URL, then POSTs a rich embed with clip details directly to that webhook.
Dropdown share menu for a clip offering copy-link, share-to-X (Twitter), and copy-for-Discord options using the clipboard API and a Twitter intent URL.
frontend/src/components/SideNavigation.t: Renders the main sidebar navigation with route links, user profile info, role badge, notifications, login/logout controls, feedback modal, and admin panel access.
frontend/src/components/SlowMoToggle.tsx: A small toggle button component that enables or disables a slow-motion effect, styled with a cyan neon active state.
Displays a list of AI-detected smart clip segments from a transcript, allowing users to click a segment to select its time range.
frontend/src/components/SoundEffectButto: Renders a grid of buttons for playing preset sound effects (airhorn, bruh, mission failed, victory) using the useSoundEffect hook.
frontend/src/components/SystemControls.t: Admin UI component for controlling system state (pause/resume, restart, shutdown) with confirmation dialogs and status indicators.
frontend/src/components/TikTokifyPresetB: A toggle button that activates or deactivates a TikTokify preset, styled with pink accent colors when active.
frontend/src/components/TimelineScrubber: An interactive video timeline scrubber with progress bar, playhead, hype markers, hover time tooltip, and thumbnail preview.
Displays a scrollable list of transcript segments with timestamps, highlights the active and selected segments, and supports click-to-seek functionality.
Shows a ranked list of the top 5 trending clips with their trending scores, using data from the admin stats hook.
frontend/src/components/UserIdDisplay.ts: Displays the current user's short ID and full principal with copy-to-clipboard buttons for each.
frontend/src/components/UserMessages.tsx: Shows the authenticated user's inbox messages with a detail view and reply functionality using the backend actor.
frontend/src/components/UserRoleBadge.ts: Renders a styled badge for a user role (owner, admin, friend, or user) with an appropriate icon and color.
frontend/src/components/UserStatusManage: Admin UI for listing, searching, and updating user roles and statuses, with copy-principal functionality.
frontend/src/components/VerticalClipPrev: Renders a 9:16 aspect-ratio preview card for a video clip, showing its thumbnail or title as a fallback.
frontend/src/components/VerticalModeTogg: A toggle button component that switches vertical (mobile) mode on or off with active/inactive styling.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form for inputting a YouTube URL to load a video and optionally trigger AI-based clip suggestion generation.
Displays a color-coded badge for a viral score, with distinct styles for high (≥80), medium (≥50), and low scores.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Renders a responsive 16:9 YouTube iframe embed for a given video ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useActivityLogs.ts: Provides an in-memory activity log store with a helper to add entries and a React Query hook to read them.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor via React Query, reinitializing it when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddAdmin.ts: Stub mutation hook for adding an admin by user ID; logs the call and shows a toast since the backend method is unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminDebug.ts: Fetches admin debug info (principal, isAdmin status) using the backend actor, with placeholders for unimplemented backend methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminList.ts: Query hook that returns the list of admin principals; currently returns an empty array as the backend method is unavailable.
Empty file, likely a placeholder for a future admin password authentication hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Fetches admin statistics (total clips, trending analytics, upload stats) from the in-memory clips store using React Query. Exports helper hooks for total clips and trending analytics.
Provides a mutation hook that simulates AI-based clip suggestion generation with a delay, returning mock clip suggestions with timestamps and viral scores.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new VideoClip with a calculated viral score, adds it to the in-memory store, and invalidates related React Query caches.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Manages an in-memory clip store with listener notifications, exposing hooks for querying and deleting clips via React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Manages start/end timestamp state (minutes and seconds) for clip creation, providing validation, formatting, and conversion utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useContentEntries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on an in-memory content entry store, with toast notifications for each operation.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteFeedback.ts: Mutation hook that calls the actor's deleteFeedbackSubmission method and invalidates the feedbackSubmissions query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadClip.ts: Mutation hook that simulates a clip download with a short delay and shows toast notifications for progress and completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackSubmission: Query hook that fetches all feedback submissions from the canister actor, returning an empty array on error or if unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackSubmit.ts: Mutation hook that submits user feedback (bug report or feature request) to the canister actor and invalidates the submissions cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetOwnRole.ts: Query hook that retrieves the authenticated caller's role from the canister actor, normalizing the result to a string.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context including login, logout, and identity state via an AuthClient-backed React context and provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: Query hook that checks whether the current authenticated caller is an admin by calling isCallerAdmin on the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useMintClip.ts: Hook that simulates minting a clip as a digital collectible, adding it to the minted store and triggering a notification on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useMintedCollectibles: Manages an in-memory store of minted collectibles with listener-based reactivity, exposing helpers to add collectibles and check mint status.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyMessages.ts: Query hook that fetches messages for the current user from the canister actor, polling every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Provides an in-memory notification store with a React hook for reading, marking read, and subscribing to notification updates; only shows notifications when a user identity is present.
frontend/src/hooks/usePostToYouTube.ts: Stub mutation hook for posting clips to YouTube that always returns a 'not available' result with a toast notification.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the caller's user profile and storing Google OAuth credentials via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScheduledUploads.t: Manages an in-memory list of scheduled clip uploads with React Query hooks for listing, adding, and deleting scheduled entries.
frontend/src/hooks/useSendAdminMessage.t: Mutation hook that sends an admin message to a target principal via the backend actor, deriving the sender's user ID from their Internet Identity principal.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserRole.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend actor to assign a role to a target principal and invalidates the userRoles query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserStatus.ts: Stub mutation hook for updating a user's status that logs locally without a real backend call and invalidates the userRoles query.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialFeed.ts: Transforms the clips store into a sorted social feed of FeedItem objects with human-readable time-ago strings, refreshing every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundEffect.ts: Provides a playSound utility that synthesizes short audio tones (airhorn, bruh, mission-failed, victory) using the Web Audio API.
frontend/src/hooks/useSystemStatus.ts: Manages a global in-memory system status value with a React hook and listener pattern for reactive updates across components.
frontend/src/hooks/useTranscriptGenerato: Generates a mock transcript of 15-second segments with sample gaming phrases and keyword-based smart-clip detection for a given video duration.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Returns the top 10 clips sorted by score from the in-memory clips store, refreshing every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserRoles.ts: Query hook intended to fetch all user roles from the backend; currently returns an empty array as the backend method is unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useYouTubeChannel.ts: Stub query hook for YouTube channel connection status that always returns disconnected since the backend lacks YouTube channel methods.
Provides utility functions to validate YouTube URLs and extract video IDs using regex.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind, imports gaming-themed fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani), and defines CSS custom properties and utility classes for a cyberpunk/neon dark theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ContentManager.tsx: Admin-only page for managing content entries (create, edit, delete) with login and admin access guards, using a dialog form and list display.
frontend/src/pages/MessagesPage.tsx: Page that displays the UserMessages component for authenticated users, with a login prompt for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/MyClipsPage.tsx: Simple page that renders the ClipList component with a header for managing and reviewing the user's video clips.
frontend/src/pages/MyGalleryPage.tsx: Gallery page showing authenticated users' high-scoring (70+) clips as collectibles in a grid, with a login prompt for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/OAuthCallback.tsx: Handles OAuth redirect callbacks by reading the authorization code from URL params and redirecting to home after a brief success/error display.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Profile page showing the authenticated user's info, role badge, and clip statistics (total clips, average score, viral clips), with a login prompt for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/Scheduler.tsx: Page for scheduling clips for YouTube upload, showing YouTube connection status, a scheduling form, and a list of scheduled uploads with delete support.
frontend/src/pages/SocialFeedPage.tsx: Displays a social feed of recent clip activity from all creators, showing user avatars, clip titles, time ranges, and viral scores with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/TrendingPage.tsx: Renders a trending clips page with a ranked grid of top viral clips and a leaderboard sidebar, pulling data from useTrendingClips and useAdminStats hooks.
frontend/src/types/app.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and types for app-specific data structures including UserProfile, VideoClip, FeedbackSubmission, ScheduledUpload, and other domain models.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and hash cleanup helpers.
frontend/src/utils/userIdGenerator.ts: Exports a single function that deterministically generates an 8-character base36 user ID from a principal string using a simple hash algorithm.
frontend/src/utils/youtubeOAuthDebug.ts: Implements a YouTubeOAuthDebugger class that logs and validates each step of the YouTube OAuth flow, including token validation, backend calls, and common error pattern matching.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom neon/purple colors, Orbitron and Rajdhani fonts, glass and neon box shadows, and enabling animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, summarizing a Cyberpunk UI project with social feed and Discord integration, listing existing features to restore from v69 (profiles, admin panel, feedback, trending, messaging, YouTube) and known issues with preset buttons.
